vocab.example: Could you put me through to Mr. Long, please?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể chuyển máy cho tôi tới anh Long không?

vocab.example: Please hold the line for a moment.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng giữ máy trong giây lát.

vocab.example: I'll get back to you by tomorrow morning.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ liên hệ lại với bạn trước sáng mai.

vocab.example: Can I leave a message for Mr. Long?
vocab.example_vi: Tôi có thể để lại lời nhắn cho anh Long không?

vocab.example: Let me confirm the meeting time with you.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi xác nhận giờ họp với bạn.

vocab.example: Could we reschedule the call to Friday?
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta có thể dời cuộc gọi sang thứ Sáu không?

vocab.example: Sorry, your voice is breaking up a little.
vocab.example_vi: Xin lỗi, giọng bạn bị đứt quãng một chút.

vocab.example: There's a lot of background noise on your end.
vocab.example_vi: Có nhiều tiếng ồn xung quanh ở phía bạn.

listening.title: A phone call with a business partner

lines.speaker: Linh (receptionist)
lines.text: Good morning, ABC Solutions, this is Linh speaking.

lines.speaker: Nam (caller)
lines.text: Hi Linh, this is Nam from TechViet. Could you put me through to Mr. Long, please?

lines.speaker: Linh (receptionist)
lines.text: Sure, please hold the line for a moment.

lines.speaker: Linh (receptionist)
lines.text: I'm sorry, Mr. Long is in a meeting right now.

lines.speaker: Nam (caller)
lines.text: That's fine. Could I leave a message for him?

lines.speaker: Linh (receptionist)
lines.text: Of course. What would you like me to tell him?

lines.speaker: Nam (caller)
lines.text: Please ask him to get back to me about rescheduling our meeting.

lines.speaker: Linh (receptionist)
lines.text: Sure, could you confirm what time works best for you?

lines.speaker: Nam (caller)
lines.text: Anytime on Friday afternoon. Sorry, can you repeat that? Your voice is breaking up.

lines.speaker: Linh (receptionist)
lines.text: Sorry, there's a lot of background noise here. I said Friday afternoon works.

lines.speaker: Nam (caller)
lines.text: Great, thank you very much, Linh.

lines.speaker: Linh (receptionist)
lines.text: You're welcome. I'll pass your message to Mr. Long today.

questions.q: Why couldn't Nam speak to Mr. Long directly?
What does Nam ask Linh to do?
options: Leave a message for Mr. Long

questions.q: What day does Nam want to reschedule the meeting to?

shadowing: Could you please put me through to Mr. Long in the sales department?
Please hold the line for a moment while I check his schedule.
Can you leave a message and I'll get back to you soon?
Sorry, could we reschedule our call to sometime next week?
Sorry, your voice is breaking up because of the background noise.
